title: Senior Software Engineer - mfine - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - mfine - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
mfine invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About mfine:
mfine is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with mfine!
